prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约10212名→11482名→14686名→21997名→18418名，整体呈后移趋势但2025年较2024年大幅回升约3579名，波动较大；2025年基 准约18418名；该校在湖北省物理类招生计划2021年41人、2022年42人、2023年42人、2024年37人、2025年38人；2026年计划大幅增至49人，较2025年扩 招约28.9%，显著增加招生名额。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第82名，近年排名稳定，属于全国知名传媒类顶尖院校；新闻传播学为A+学科，与物理类部分招生专业（传播学、广告学、网络与新媒体等）对应；计算机、电子信息类虽未单独评级但依托传媒行业特 色，就业方向明确；2025年声誉偏正面（新闻传播学获评A++等级），2026年声誉转为偏负面（涉及宿舍火灾等校园安全事件）；抖音热度为高热（总排名第11位），报考关注度较高；未见明显 投档断档记录。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业社会热度高热推荐，电气工程及其自动化高热推荐，工科专业整体报考热度高；湖北省2026年普通 高考总人数约39.37万人，物理类估算约25.14万人，较2025年小幅增加，竞争略有加剧，2025年物理类本科批426分；中国传媒大学位于北京 ，非湖北省本地高校，无本省招生倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅回升、2026年大幅扩招约28.9%缓解竞争、工科专业社 会热度高吸引报考、抖音高热反映关注度高、本省考生小幅增加等因素，在2025年基准18418名基础上预计位次后移但扩招效应显著；预测最低位次约21697名，区间21197–22197 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 10212 → 11482 → 14686 → 21997 → 18418, showing an overall backward trend but a significant rebound of about 3579 places in 2025 compared to 2024, with large fluctuations; the 2025 baseline is about 18418. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hubei Province was 41 in 2021, 42 in 2022, 42 in 2023, 37 in 2024, and 38 in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 49, an expansion of about 28.9% compared to 2025, notably increasing enrollment slots.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 82nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in recent years, and is a nationally renowned top-tier media institution; Journalism and Communication is an A+ discipline, corresponding to some Physics Category enrollment majors (Communication, Advertising, Network and New Media, etc.); Computer and Electronic Information categories, though not individually rated, rely on the characteristics of the media industry with clear employment directions; reputation in 2025 is relatively positive (Journalism and Communication rated A++), while in 2026 it turns relatively negative (involving campus safety incidents such as dormitory fires); Douyin popularity is high (overall ranking 11th), with high application attention; no obvious records of application gaps or breaks.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication majors are highly recommended with high social popularity, Electrical Engineering and Automation is highly recommended, and engineering majors overall have high application popularity; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Hubei Province general college entrance examination is about 393,700, with Physics Category estimated at about 251,400, a slight increase compared to 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition; the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch line is 426 points; Communication University of China is located in Beijing, not a local university in Hubei Province, with no enrollment preference for this province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the significant rebound in 2025 rankings, a substantial enrollment expansion of about 28.9% in 2026 easing competition, high social popularity of engineering majors attracting applicants, high Douyin popularity reflecting high attention, and a slight increase in local candidates, based on the 2025 baseline of 18418, the ranking is expected to shift backward but with a significant expansion effect; the predicted minimum ranking is about 21697, with a range of 21197–22197.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (21197–22197), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<21197), you can focus on aiming for popular engineering majors such as Digital Media Technology and the Artificial Intelligence Experimental Class; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>22197), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety options and consider other institutions.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1427 → 1769 → 2071 → 2951 → 4070, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2300 in the past 3 years, and a 2025 baseline of about 4070; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hubei Province was 15 in 2021, 14 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 17 in 2024, and 17 in 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 20, an expansion of about 17.6% compared to 2025, which will alleviate some competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 82nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 80–84 range in recent years, making it a nationally renowned top media institution; reputation in 2025 was relatively positive (Journalism and Communication rated A++), but turned negative in 2026 (involving campus safety incidents such as dormitory fires); Douyin popularity is high (overall rank 11th), with large short video exposure and high application attention; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; Journalism and Communication is an A+ discipline (national top), highly corresponding to the university's History Category majors (Journalism, Communication, Advertising, Radio and Television, etc.), and the discipline strength strongly attracts applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Journalism and Communication majors has significantly cooled in recent years (rated as clearly discouraged in 2023), and increased employment competition may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Hubei Province general college entrance examination is about 393,700, with History Category estimated at about 142,300, a slight increase from 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition; the 2025 History Category undergraduate batch line is 442 points; Communication University of China is located in Beijing, not a local university in Hubei Province, so there is no provincial enrollment preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 17.6% to alleviate competition, the cooling social popularity of Journalism and Communication majors suppressing applications, high Douyin popularity reflecting sustained attention, and a slight increase in local candidates, the ranking is expected to continue moving backward but with a narrowed range based on the 2025 baseline of 4070; the predicted minimum ranking is about 4551, with a range of 4051–5051.
